name: pptx-mcp
summary: AI-powered PowerPoint (.pptx) generation, editing, and review via MCP — 42 tools, 34 slide types (incl. SCR executive summary + RAG scorecard), 12 chart types, 8 diagrams, 12 brand presets, 27 deck archetypes, and a 28-rule review engine with WCAG accessibility, action-title enforcement, data-provenance checks, and auto-fix
author: swak
